history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible up ahead and to the right. I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward would be unsafe. The cell to my right is a safe floor tile, and turning right will orient me toward that safe path and toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is above and to the left, and the safe route goes through the floor cell above me. Turning left will face me toward that open cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward again. The cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The goal is to the upper right, and the safe adjacent option is the floor cell to my right. Turning right will orient me toward that safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but the cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. The goal is up and left, and the open floor above me is the best safe move to approach it. I should turn left to face that open cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am back facing upward with lava directly in front of me, so I cannot move forward safely. The goal remains to the upper right, and the safe path starts by moving through the open cell on my right. I should turn right to face that route.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is still a wall, so moving forward is not possible. The safest progress toward the goal is to face the open cell above me, which also moves me closer to the goal. I should turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am again facing upward at the same position, with lava directly ahead, so moving forward would be fatal. The safe route toward the goal is through the open cell to my right, so I should rotate clockwise to align with it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The view matches the earlier blocked position: the cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. Turning left will face the open path above, which is the safe direction that leads closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward with lava directly in front of me, so moving forward is unsafe. The open cell to my right offers the safe path toward the goal, so I should rotate clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is not possible. Turning left will face the open corridor above, which is the safe route toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am again facing upward with lava directly ahead, so moving forward would be fatal. The safe open path is to my right, which also leads toward the visible goal, so I should turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. Turning left will face the open cell above me, which is the safe path back toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward again, and the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open route is to my right, which heads toward the visible goal. I should turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The wall is directly ahead again, so moving forward is impossible. The safe progress route is to turn left to face the open cell above, which leads back toward the goal area.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am back facing upward at the same position. The cell directly ahead is lava, so I cannot move forward. The safe path toward the goal is to my right through open floor, so I should turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>
